The table shows the number of lawns you mowed each month for a year.

\begin{center}
\begin{tabular}{|c|c|c|c|c|c|}
\hline
\multicolumn{6}{|c|}{\textbf{Lawns Mowed}} \\
\hline
5 & 12 & 7 & 10 & 25 & 30 \\
\hline
12 & 8 & 21 & 17 & 20 & 4 \\
\hline
\end{tabular}
\end{center}

\textbf{a.} Make a stem-and-leaf plot for the lawns you mowed.

\textbf{b.} In how many months did you mow less than 12 lawns?

\textbf{c.} How are the data distributed?
